scripts.sync: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Write-Output '== git sync =='; if (-not (Test-Path '.git')) { throw 'Chưa có .git. Hãy chạy: git init' }; $changesText = ((git status --porcelain) -join [Environment]::NewLine); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($changesText)) { Write-Output 'No changes to commit.'; exit 0 }; Write-Output 'Changes detected:'; Write-Output $changesText; git add -A; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; git commit -m \"auto: save $ts\"; git push"
